name: pr_cep_not_chain_defer
drl: rule NT when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,150ms] $a) not E2(this after[0ms,100ms] $b) then end
comment: chain not: $a:E0 $b:E1(before $a) not E2(after $b) — the D-125 join then the not filter+defer; fires (E0@3,E1@-140). — graduated D-134 (§3B temporal-not firing-deferral port landed): the not-wall is down, engine==oracle. Was an engine_fenced recon witness.
